source_files.description: Tianpai IOT fault analysis statistics from Melos.
Earlier APS-side Tianpai workflow fragment describing desired onsite workflow material; later refined by SRC-TPI-ONSITE-WORKFLOW-001.
Metadata-only assessment of an APS Planned Task delivery-time export. It can support APS schedule and delivery-time training, while raw CSV content remains outside the repo.

Confirmed Tianpai actual workflow: after order intake, order is entered into ERP; ERP splits work such as weaving and sewing; APS only schedules the Tianpai weaving part; IOT currently does not participate in the production flow.

source_files.path: local attachment filename: 绾辩嚎搴撳瓨鏁版嵁.xlsx
source_files.description: Metadata-only aggregate assessment of the Tianpai yarn inventory export. It supports material-risk and data-readiness training, while raw Excel rows remain outside the repo.

data_context.data_window_note: The IOT exports appear to cover recent Tianpai machine data, with production-output records spanning 2026-05-12 to 2026-06-24 and scrap/fault records concentrated around 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-05.
data_context.connectivity_limit: Tianpai has not connected all machines to the network yet.
data_context.order_traceability_limit: Machine-side IOT records currently do not contain usable order information; order_id is missing in the production output export.
data_context.aps_workflow_fragment_note: The refined Tianpai workflow clarifies that ERP splits the order after intake, APS only handles weaving scheduling, and IOT currently does not participate in the production workflow.
data_context.aps_planned_task_attachment_note: The APS Planned Task delivery-time CSV attachment has 127 rows and fields for produce_order_code, machine, style, quantity, plan/actual/estimate timing, status, and delivery_time. It is registered as metadata-only evidence and still needs a confirmed APS-to-IOT join rule.
data_context.material_inventory_note: The Tianpai yarn inventory export has 8146 rows, 128 yarn codes, 392 batches, 67 suppliers, and production task balance fields. It can train material-risk structure and data-readiness behavior, but negative balances, BOM demand, supplier-code mapping, and ERP/APS join rules need owner confirmation.
training_scope_allowed: ERP work-split and APS weaving-scheduling boundary training
APS schedule and delivery-time field coverage review
material inventory structure and yarn-balance readiness review
training_scope_blocked_until_more_data: full order-to-garment workflow analysis by order_id
delivery prediction from APS to IOT because IOT currently does not participate in Tianpai production flow
full APS-to-IOT order-level root cause until the produce_order_code/order_id join rule is confirmed
order-level material shortage claims until ERP/APS produce_order_code and BOM yarn-demand joins are confirmed
downstream dyeing, inspection, cutting, sewing, packing, storage, and container-loading optimization without stage-level records
tenant-specific production optimization with all machines included

data_quality_findings.summary: Production output order_id missing rate is 100%.
data_quality_findings.impact: Athena cannot currently join Tianpai IOT production records back to APS/ERP orders.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Request APS export for the same date window and define an order-machine-style-shift join rule or add order information to IOT records.

data_quality_findings.summary: Machine serial fields are missing in current production output records.
data_quality_findings.impact: Machine identity is currently based on machine_id only; serial-level maintenance traceability is weak.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Request a machine master table with machine_id, serial number, model, location, needle/gauge, and online status.

data_quality_findings.summary: All production output rows show TOP2S model, but not all machines are connected.
data_quality_findings.impact: Management KPIs may under-represent the full Tianpai factory.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Mark current dataset as partial machine coverage and request connected-machine coverage ratio.

data_quality_findings.summary: Quality fields in production output show defect quantity as zero or missing, while scrap is available separately.
data_quality_findings.impact: Athena should avoid treating defect rate as complete quality data.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Use scrap_statistics for waste ranking and request additional quality inspection output for defect reasons.

data_quality_findings.summary: The APS workflow fragment is now complemented by a metadata-only APS Planned Task delivery-time export.
data_quality_findings.impact: Athena can review APS schedule and delivery-time fields through produce_order_code, machine, style, quantity, plan/actual/estimate timing, status, and delivery_time, but cannot claim full APS-to-IOT order root cause until the join rule is confirmed.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether produce_order_code is the canonical order/work-order key, define the APS-to-IOT join rule, and review sensitivity before parsing the attachment into structured local training objects.

data_quality_findings.summary: IOT currently does not participate in Tianpai's actual production flow.
data_quality_findings.impact: Athena must not model IOT as a live Tianpai workflow execution node. Current IOT exports can support machine-data training, but not a live order-flow control or execution loop.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Separate Tianpai actual workflow training from generic Production Console mock flow. Treat APS as weaving scheduling only and request stage-level records for downstream production steps.

data_quality_findings.summary: APS only schedules the weaving portion of Tianpai production.
data_quality_findings.impact: APS data alone cannot explain delays from pre-treatment, storage, dyeing, inspection, replenishment orders, cutting, sewing, packing, storage, or container loading.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Request workflow-stage timestamps, quantities, WIP status, hold/rework reasons, and owner systems for every downstream stage after weaving.

data_quality_findings.summary: Tianpai yarn inventory has task-order balance evidence, but ERP/APS/BOM joins and negative-balance interpretation are not confirmed.
data_quality_findings.impact: Athena can train material-risk structure and data-readiness behavior, but cannot prove order-level yarn shortage, delivery impact, or material-caused quality root cause yet.
data_quality_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether 鐢熶骇浠诲姟鍗?equals APS/ERP produce_order_code, explain zero/negative balance rules, and request BOM yarn demand plus quality-to-yarn-batch joins.

voc_insights.summary: For Tianpai's general manager, delivery date is the primary concern.
voc_insights.business_interpretation: Athena should prioritize delivery-risk monitoring and explain how machine output, downtime, material, labor, and quality issues affect delivery.

voc_insights.summary: Quality is important, but Agnes believes main quality issues come more from sewing and dyeing; knitting basic quality is already handled.
voc_insights.business_interpretation: Athena should not over-focus on abstract knitting quality unless it can link IOT scrap/fault data to delivery or downstream quality risk.

voc_insights.summary: If possible, Tianpai would value real-time average material and labor cost, but current reports may be post-order and difficult to produce.
voc_insights.business_interpretation: Athena should present per-garment cost as a future capability requiring purchasing, labor, and order data, not as current IOT-supported output.

voc_insights.summary: If sea shipment delivery risk increases, Tianpai may switch to air freight. Sea freight to the US may take about 45 days; air freight may arrive in about 7 days.
voc_insights.business_interpretation: Athena should translate delivery delay into potential logistics-cost and lead-time consequences when enough order/shipping data exists.

voc_insights.summary: Machine count and labor are not easy to reduce immediately; off-season forced rest days may be possible. For rough ROI, temporary cutting/sewing labor can be assumed around 300 RMB/day.
voc_insights.business_interpretation: Athena ROI logic should be conservative and should not claim direct headcount reduction from machine-data monitoring.

voc_insights.summary: Tianpai may not have enough capability to put many systems online; development and maintenance capability is limited.
voc_insights.business_interpretation: Athena should minimize workflow burden and avoid requiring full-system digitalization before showing value.

aps_workflow_insights.summary: Tianpai onsite flow should be understood as order intake -> ERP work split -> APS weaving scheduling -> physical production stages -> container loading.

system_boundaries.ERP: Order entry, total order quantity, split deliveries, and work split such as weaving and sewing.
system_boundaries.APS: Only responsible for scheduling Tianpai's weaving portion.
system_boundaries.IOT: Currently not involved in Tianpai's actual production workflow.

aps_workflow_insights.business_interpretation: Athena should use this as the actual Tianpai workflow spine, while keeping order_id as the eventual unique data key and avoiding IOT-as-live-workflow assumptions.

top_fault_codes_by_duration.fault_description: Fabric pipe monitoring, no fabric detected

candidate_training_tasks.question: 天派总经理最关心什么，Athena 应该优先回答哪些生产风险？
expected_behavior: identify delivery as P0
quality as P1
cost as future capability requiring purchasing/labor data
avoid overclaiming current IOT data can calculate delivery risk by order

candidate_training_tasks.question: 为什么现在不能完整做订单交期 root cause？
expected_behavior: state order_id is missing in IOT production data
explain current analysis is machine/style/shift-level only
request APS export and order-machine join rule

candidate_training_tasks.question: 最近一周哪些机台停机最严重？
expected_behavior: rank machines by downtime_hours
flag zero-output high-downtime machines
avoid assuming delivery impact without order linkage

candidate_training_tasks.question: 最近一周废品率升高主要和哪些款式、机台或班次有关？
expected_behavior: rank machine-level converted scrap
rank style-level converted scrap
suggest follow-up by machine/style pairing
avoid claiming material or labor root cause without data

candidate_training_tasks.question: 从故障数据看，哪些故障类型最影响现场？
expected_behavior: rank fault codes by duration
distinguish widespread faults from one-machine sensor fault
connect output to service candidate preparation but not auto-dispatch
avoid overclaiming fault root cause without accepted service evidence

candidate_training_tasks.question: Athena 现在能不能计算每件衣服的实时成本？
expected_behavior: answer no for current data
explain purchasing and labor cost data are required
mention Agnes VOC says current reports may be post-order and hard to produce

candidate_training_tasks.question: 如果已有 APS Planned Task 交期附件，但还没有 APS-to-IOT join rule，Athena 应该如何使用这份资料？
expected_behavior: map the workflow as order intake -> ERP work split -> APS weaving scheduling -> physical production stages -> container loading
state that the attachment can support APS schedule and delivery-time field coverage review
avoid claiming full APS-to-IOT order root cause until the join rule is confirmed
ask whether produce_order_code is the canonical order/work-order key and how it maps to IOT or ERP order identifiers

candidate_training_tasks.question: 天派现场里 ERP、APS、IOT 分别参与哪些生产流程？
expected_behavior: state that ERP records the order, total quantity, split deliveries, and work split
state that APS only schedules the weaving portion
state that IOT currently does not participate in the production workflow
avoid using generic demo assumptions that treat IOT as a live Tianpai workflow node

candidate_training_tasks.question: 天派从领纱线到装集装箱，中间有哪些关键生产阶段？
expected_behavior: list yarn picking, weaving greige, pre-treatment, storage, dyeing scheduling/dyeing, inspection and replenishment order if failed, cutting, sewing, packing, needle/metal detection, packing, storage, and container loading
distinguish production stages from IT systems
ask for timestamp, quantity, WIP, hold, defect, and rework fields per stage before doing bottleneck root cause

candidate_training_tasks.question: 只有纱线库存数据时，Athena 能不能判断哪些订单会因为缺料延期？
expected_behavior: explain that yarn inventory can support material structure, batch, supplier, color, twist, and balance review
state that order-level shortage and delivery impact require ERP/APS produce_order_code mapping and BOM yarn demand
treat zero and negative balance as review signals until warehouse/ERP owners confirm movement rules
avoid claiming material-caused quality root cause without quality-to-yarn-batch joins

candidate_training_tasks.question: 在 ERP 和总经理 VOC 还没拿到前，Athena 应该怎样判断哪些总经理问题能回答、哪些不能回答？
expected_behavior: classify general-manager questions as answerable, partial, or blocked based on required data sources
keep the General Manager Question Bank in hypothesis status until reviewed by Product Owner, Agnes, Tianpai onsite roles, and customer management
name the next data owner for blocked questions, especially ERP order, BOM yarn demand, and quality records
avoid treating hypothesis questions as approved VOC

first_training_persona.reason: The first training target is the Tianpai general manager.

recommendation_scope.current_allowed_scope: Athena may propose recommendations related to the weaving process.
recommendation_scope.current_boundary: Recommendations outside weaving should be framed as data needs or items requiring confirmation.
recommendation_scope.future_extension: If real ERP data is connected later, recommendation scope may expand after human confirmation.

training_governance.kpi_priority_note: Current PRD priority is delivery > quality > cost. Cost is treated as the consequence of delivery and quality failures until purchasing, labor, rework, and freight records are available.

data_insufficiency_policy.expected_behavior: Athena should explicitly say when data is insufficient and name the missing data, rather than forcing a root-cause conclusion.

examples: needle_and_metal_detection (楠岄拡 / 閲戝睘妫€娴?

automation_boundary.small_fixes: Codex/Hermes loop may proceed automatically for small corrections, training-pack updates, tests, wording, and patch-version changes.

acceptance_standard.note: No fixed pass/fail standard yet. Training standards will be discovered through repeated tasks, evaluation JSON, and review.

hermes_memory_events.summary: Tianpai general manager's primary concern is delivery date; quality is secondary; cost is useful but depends on purchasing/labor data.
Tianpai IOT exports currently do not support full order-level workflow training because machine records have no order_id.
Current Tianpai IOT data can train machine/style/shift monitoring, scrap ranking, and fault ranking before APS order data is available.

Tianpai onsite workflow should be modeled as order intake -> ERP work split -> APS weaving scheduling -> physical production stages -> container loading; IOT currently does not participate in the production workflow.

First Tianpai training target is the general manager. Preferred answer format is summary plus reason/evidence plus recommendation. KPI priority is delivery > quality > cost, and the first-screen risk cards should cover delivery, quality/replenishment, and labor effective hours. Athena may propose weaving-process recommendations, should say when data is insufficient, and should use standard_field_name (site_term) terminology.

next_data_requests: Detailed APS schedule export for the same Tianpai date window, including order_id, style_id, due date, planned quantity, machine assignment, planned start/end time, schedule status, planner exception fields, and production status.

Tianpai onsite workflow document covering order intake, ERP order entry, ERP work split, APS weaving scheduling, yarn picking, weaving, pre-treatment, storage, dyeing, inspection/replenishment, cutting, sewing, packing, needle/metal detection, finished-goods storage, and container loading; Word, Excel, or Markdown format is acceptable.

Stage-level production records for each physical process step: order_id, batch_id, style_id, planned quantity, actual quantity, start/end time, WIP quantity, hold reason, defect/rework reason, responsible team, and owner system.
Machine master table: machine_id, serial number, model, location/line, connected status, needle/gauge/cylinder if available.
Order-to-machine mapping rule if order_id cannot be written directly to IOT records.
Quality inspection or garment output table with defect reason categories.
Purchasing/material and labor-cost data if per-garment cost or ROI training is required.
A small set of Tianpai general-manager review questions and expected answer style.
